case_title: SUSAN MARGARET WILPITZ VS. PATRICIA BASS-WALKER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY WILPITZ, SUSAN MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT BASS-WALKER, PATRICIA AKA PATRICIA BAKARICH AKA TRISH BAKARICH AKA TRISHA BAKARICH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $95) SERVED NOV-16-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BASS-WALKER, PATRICIA AKA PATRICIA BAKARICH AKA TRISH BAKARICH AKA TRISHA BAKARICH
CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT BASS-WALKER, PATRICIA AKA PATRICIA BAKARICH AKA TRISH BAKARICH AKA TRISHA BAKARICH
RE: CHALLENGE TO VENUE -NOTICE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES FILED BY DEFENDANT BASS-WALKER, PATRICIA AKA PATRICIA BAKARICH AKA TRISH BAKARICH AKA TRISHA BAKARICH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO FEB-22-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SUSAN MARGARET WILPITZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICIA BASS-WALKER IS NOT PRESENT. RE: CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED ON DEC-02-2022 BY DEFENDANT, COURT FINDS VENUE IS IMPROPER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
